result.summary: The page has a few notable visual defects: a header button with no visible label, a 'SCROLL DOWN' element overlapping and obscuring the legal disclaimer text, and very small low-contrast fine print. Overall the promotional layout renders correctly, but the overlap and empty button are significant problems.

issues.description: The yellow button in the top-right of the header has no visible text or icon, appearing as an empty yellow rectangle. This is likely meant to be a 'Sign Up' or 'Log In' CTA that failed to render its label.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button label text loads and is styled with sufficient contrast against the yellow background (e.g., dark navy text reading 'Sign Up').

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator with chevron arrows overlaps the legal/terms disclaimer paragraph at the bottom of the yellow section, making portions of the required T&C text unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' element below or above the disclaimer text, or add spacing/margins so the two elements do not overlap; legal text should never be obscured.

issues.description: The disclaimer/terms text is rendered in very small blue text on a bright yellow background and is partially covered, resulting in poor readability and likely failing contrast/legibility requirements for legally required gambling disclosures.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, use a higher-contrast color (e.g., dark navy on yellow), and ensure the full text is visible without obstruction.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' banner appears as a semi-transparent white strip abruptly cutting across the disclaimer area, looking unintentional and visually jarring.
issues.suggestion: Style the scroll indicator as a distinct, contained element (e.g., a pill button or animated chevron) placed in whitespace rather than a translucent overlay over content.
